title: ctenolepis cerasiformis
intro: Ctenolepis cerasiformis, also known as the African cherry, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and skin infections. The medicinal properties of Ctenolepis cerasiformis include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
